items.name_en: Real shot,
items.name_cn:
Real shot,
24 model Rocking Horse Handbag
A structured soft tote bag,
Croc-embossed calfskin, soft suede lining,
Creating a luxurious yet understated texture.
Features a "b" letter closure,
And the EKD embossed print on the back. This bag is highly practical, can be used as a tote bag,
And also comes with a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for crossbody use.
Perfect for daily commuting, client meetings, or attending events!

Real shot#
Style No.: 498156 Small
Size: 26x18x10cm
Padlock Small Shopping Bag
Small and slightly refined, very reasonable capacity and absolutely sufficient! Suitable for casual or formal occasions, commuting to work, and equally not heavy. The leather shoulder strap is more comfortable to carry! Exquisite, durable, understated, and versatile.

items.name_en: Reinventing the classic, the Swing is back. BOTTEGA VENETA Women's Swing Tote features tubular padded weaving, creating a unique vertical texture that is memorable. It exudes a vintage vibe, aligning with current retro trends. Simple yet versatile and personal, it adapts easily to different styles for work or commuting. Designed for both shoulder and hand carry, it is a bag that balances practicality and beauty [Jump][Jump]
items.name_cn:
Reinventing the classic, the Swing is back. BOTTEGA VENETA Women's Swing Tote features tubular padded weaving, creating a unique vertical texture that is memorable. It exudes a vintage vibe, aligning with current retro trends. Simple yet versatile and personal, it adapts easily to different styles for work or commuting. Designed for both shoulder and hand carry, it is a bag that balances practicality and beauty [Jump][Jump]
Model: 764073
Size: 25*19*6

items.name_en: Replica Miu Miu
items.name_cn:
Replica Miu Miu
Extended Wrist Strap: 5BB117: MiuMiu New Bowling Bag, made of top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and soft leather, cotton satin lining. This bag is cool, capturing a refined multifunctional design that blends men's and women's elements, casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Oversized capacity yet lightweight, simple yet not simplistic, almost everyone has one among fashion bloggers. Dimensions: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)

specs.rawTitle:
Replica Miu Miu
Extended Wrist Strap: 5BB117: MiuMiu New Bowling Bag, made of top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and soft leather, cotton satin lining. items.name_en: Replica Miu Miu Black
items.name_cn:
Replica Miu Miu Black
5BB148, Miu's new bowling bag, a top pick on the official site, an absolute hit🔥 this year. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern, exquisite and structured body, front engraved logo matches the leather color, detachable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, cotton satin lining, zippered pocket, a favorite among many stars and influencers. Dimensions 27X12X9Cm, comes with original packaging.
